title: Nextcloud Playground Blueprint
description: Declarative configuration for provisioning a Nextcloud Playground instance at boot.

browserCompatibility.description: Explicit browser workarounds for trusted apps.

sandboxedIframes.description: service-worker removes credentialless from same-origin sandboxed app frames that already opt into allow-same-origin, allowing their resources to use the Playground Service Worker. This reduces iframe isolation and should only be enabled for trusted apps.

landingPage.description: Path to open after boot, e.g. /index.php/apps/dashboard or /index.php/login.

admin.description: Admin account created by occ maintenance:install.

apps.description: Shorthand for enabling bundled apps; each entry expands to an enableApp step.

steps.description: Provisioning steps executed (in order) after install.

url.description: Source URL: the app ZIP for installApp, the file contents for writeFile, or the archive for unzip (CORS-enabled host required).

destination.description: unzip: target directory for the extracted archive, relative to the Nextcloud root or absolute. A single top-level wrapper folder in the archive is stripped.

enable.description: installApp: enable the app after extracting it (default true).

path.description: writeFile: target path, relative to the Nextcloud root or absolute.

content.description: writeFile: file contents (text, or base64 when encoding is set).
